meaning: adj.(有)大三角帆的n.三角帆船
examples: A lateen-rigged sailboat called a felucca plies the Nile River in fading light near Aswan, Egypt.
These changes shifted the motive power of the vessel away from oar-power and onto the three huge lateen sails.
Finally, here’s a large three-masted square-rigger flying five tiers of square sails and several head sails, with a lateen sail aft.
As we talked, feluccas, traditional wooden boats with lateen sails, cruised by the windows.
